originalTitle: Wall Street ends higher as major tech-related shares jump
summary: STORY: Wall Street's main indexes closed higher on Monday, with the Dow adding about six-tenths of a percent to notch a record closing high, the S&P 500 climbing nearly 1.2% and the Nasdaq gaining 2%. Several tech stocks that had fallen recently due to concerns about AI spending rebounded on Monday. That and quarter-end "window dressing," where investors buy certain stocks to make their portfolios look better, helped boost the market, says Bob Lang, founder and chief options analyst of Explosive Options. “I think what's driving stocks today is here we are at the end of the month, end of the quarter, and there's a lot of, you know, they call it window dressing going on here. There's a lot of funds that are needing to get into some stocks and getting out of others. The last week and a half, we've had a really good broad rally in this market, not just technology stocks, which some of the big names have fallen off the cliff a little bit, the Mag 7 names. But they are pulling back up today on the 29th. And I think that, you know, there's some, there's some good energy here in the markets.” Among those Magnificent 7 names that rose on Monday: Google parent Alphabet, which gained about 5% in its first day as a Dow component. Shares of SpaceX jumped more than 7% after the Nasdaq said the newly listed company will be added to the Nasdaq 100 index on July 7. And shares of Comcast rose about 4.5% after the media and cable provider said it plans to separate into two independent, publicly traded companies through a spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky. Meanwhile, RBC Capital Markets on Monday raised its 12-month target for the S&P 500 to 8,150 from 7,900, citing earnings strength and a supportive macroeconomic backdrop.

chineseTitle: 随着主要科技股上涨，华尔街收高
chineseSummary: 故事：华尔街主要股指周一收高，其中道指上涨约十分之六，创下收盘新高，标准普尔 500 指数上涨近 1.2%，纳斯达克指数上涨 2%。最近因对人工智能支出的担忧而下跌的几只科技股周一反弹。 Explosive Options 创始人兼首席期权分析师鲍勃·朗 (Bob Lang) 表示，投资者购买某些股票以使投资组合看起来更好的季度末“门面装饰”有助于提振市场。 “我认为今天推动股市的因素是我们现在正值月底、季度末，有很多，你知道，他们称之为粉饰。有很多资金需要买入一些股票，卖出另一些股票。过去一周半，我们在这个市场上经历了一次非常好的广泛反弹，而不仅仅是科技股，一些大牌股票已经从悬崖上掉下来了，比如 Mag 7 股票。但它们正在拉动股票。” 29 日，我认为，市场上有一些良好的能量。”周一上涨的 Magnificent 7 股票中包括谷歌母公司 Alphabet，该公司作为道指成分股首日上涨约 5%。纳斯达克宣布新上市公司将于 7 月 7 日被纳入纳斯达克 100 指数后，SpaceX 的股价上涨了 7% 以上。媒体和有线电视提供商康卡斯特表示计划通过分拆 NBCUniversal 和 Sky 分拆为两家独立的上市公司后，该公司的股价上涨了约 4.5%。与此同时，加拿大皇家银行资本市场周一将标准普尔 500 指数 12 个月目标从 7,900 点上调至 8,150 点，理由是盈利强劲和宏观经济背景有利。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
